transcript: Yo, what's going on? It's your boy Lil T.J. And these are 10 things I can't live without. My jewels. Of course, Jerry don't make a guy, you know what I'm saying? But I definitely do feel like I got a different, like, energy on me. When I got my chains on, I feel like it just it feel good i like the glow it give me and i'm saying i like how light up the room you know it feel good so i definitely always got my jewels with me i was starting up like um trench kid and making it a loc and putting it together i made my design this is actually the logo got a richard millie watch i don't have it on right now but i got got this watch, too. He got it, too. The eyes grow in the dark. My next essential item is Sprite. Sprite go a long way for me. Sprite my favorite soda. Sometimes I'll be having mood swings. I'll be cheating on my my spray sometimes, getting something else, but this shit been with me since it came, so I'm on my favorite sodas, man, ain't gonna lie. I'm the type of person, I go into the exotic pop store and just go crazy, just grab wild shit that, you feel me, nobody never seen before, but my grandma just be posting that for me, snacks and shit too, like I'd be adventurous. But I like Fanta though, Fanta probably come next. Valor with a burger, fries, some pizza, sturdy. Yeah, this shit Valor with mostly everything. All right, one of the main things I need to live my day-to-day life is my phone. I bust all my moves with the phone. It just helps me stay organized, know what I got to do. Probably the most important thing, I have to water damn near my knee. My day-to-day apps is really Instagram, real, real Instagram. And I might play like a little phone game. I got this game called Killer Bean. It's like a little shooting game, shit fire. I probably am addicted to my phone. Sometimes I don't even watch movies and TVs cause I can't get into it cause I always get back distracted with my phone, so facts. I be listening to all type of shit. I be listening to like damn near drill shit. Sometimes I be having my R&B moods. I even hop in like pop country sometimes. I'm fucking with SZA right now. I like snooze. I know Ed Sheeran, he got that heat, you feel me? For people like me. For real, for real, like new generation, like Polo one of my favorite artists. I be listenin' like a lot of Polo. My next essential is a good pair of feet. You know, this go what i was saying you got like me i can't be out here looking any type of way my sure choice today is these ones i'm saying red and black it's the chicago ones yeah good pair of feets that's definitely you know i'm saying that's definitely an essential i wouldn't consider myself a sneakerhead, but, like, because I feel like the background and, like, the education behind what comes with this shit, I don't got it, you know what I'm saying? But I definitely love me a good pair of feets. Air Force Ones, for sure, is mandatory. That's, like, that's what I should have had right now with me, you know what I'm saying? I could have had those with me right now. $365 in a year, like, no exaggeration. I'm buying 85 pair ups It's one of the most important essentials some condoms I ain't gonna lie I ain't really a fiend for like that you feel me. I'm more of a subtle guy I'm saying when it's that time i'm gonna use these right here safety first my next essential is a lighter preferably bic i feel like it's the most reliable they go the best against the wind and they kind of look the drippiest it's like you kind of you got the other ones it's just like it's like this is the designer of the lighter you might use this for a couple things you know i'm saying one of my favorite things to use this for when it's that time of the day i'm saying i like backwards i had like apparently like a four-year run to just backwards for some reason i just left jamaica that's probably the reason and I was smoking like a lot of papers, and I've been back for like less than 24, and I ain't adjust back to my woods yet, but yeah, I'm a backwards type of guy. The next essential is a pair of shades. Sometimes you might be a little too like, you you know, out of it, you know what I'm saying? Or your eyes look a little relaxed. Throw these on, you know what I'm saying? Good chill, sit back, read the room. Don't let it read you, you feel me? It can be easy on you. Yeah, I lose a lot of sunglasses for sure. I be buying sunglasses to go with my outfit occasionally. I damn near like to match my sunglasses with the brand I'm wearing most of the time. LV, yeah, LV for sure. I probably got the most LV glasses out of any brand. I think the sunglasses wave really just came about, but it's heavy right now. But I've been wearing glasses for about seven, eight months, like more, and yeah, I'm kicking up on them. My next essential is a hat. Bucket hats is my swag. I ain't gonna lie, something cool about bucket hats, I feel like they just not oversaturated. It's probably why I like them like that. But in this case, we got two flavors. Not even particular to these, but just hats, you know, in general. Cause you know what they help for? Got a little bad hair day, you know what I'm saying? Throw this on, you sturdy. You know what I'm saying? Just like the glasses, a good accessory. I had a Louis V. Bucker, I had the other day, pain. I had the strings with the, you gotta put the picture that go ding. You feel me, got the strings, and I had like two little Louis V songs,on's pain yeah you know it's crazy i got a song i say in new york but i hate wearing bullcat normally i'm saying my bucket has my central back head they show a little suss right now do the little sound how would you describe your style though they're gonna have to humble me i think i got the best drip in the world i ain't even trying to say right now i. I'm churning a little bit, but for me, I ain't going to lie. Go-to brand right now, Louis V. Louis V. My next essential is some Jamaican food. Right now, we ain't got no Jamaican food. That's why I got this menu right here. Oxtail rice and peas, you know what I'm saying? Curry goat, beef patty. I like all this shit, Jamaican shit's wild. That shit's fire. I don't like this shit when they be having the fake shit. They trying to copy the culture, they don't know what they doing. I like the legit shit. The next essential is my wallet. My wallet holds everything down, you know what I'm saying? I need my wallet to have my card to pay the bills, my ID. Sometimes I leave my wallet, I left my security on my wallet. Sometimes if it's like, because there might be too much shit in there, it might fuck up my outfit, just look too funny on me, might pass it off real quick. I like to carry cash sometimes i build cash too fast when i got it i keep pulling that shit out or tell somebody pay me cash because cash be flying for me but i always got that car i don't even be going too too crazy on the flavors with the wallets i could like go a little crazier but i didn't even be thinking about that shit too much. But I always, you know what I'm saying, got that wallet. I ain't going to show y'all what I'm saying here for other purposes, but you know. That's a wrap. It's your boy Lil T.J., man. Shout out to GQ. Thanks for having me.
